sections.paragraph:
Original: נדיב

Transliteration: nâdı̂yb

Phonetic: naw-deeb'

BDB Definition:

  1. inclined, willing, noble, generous (adjective)
    1. incited, inclined, willing
    2. noble, princely (in rank)
    3. noble (in mind and character)
  2. noble one (noun masculine)

Origin: from H5068

TWOT entry: 1299b

Part(s) of speech:
